original_image_tags: A scan of a single, typewritten page. The paper is aged and slightly off-white. The text describes "Incident 223" regarding a sighting on December 5, 1948. There are two dark, circular punch holes at the top center of the page. A faint horizontal line runs near the bottom of the page. The typewriter font is consistent with mid-20th-century government documents.

elements.description: Typewritten document titled 'Incident 223' detailing an event from 5 Dec 1948. Contains multiple paragraphs of text and a tabulated list of other sightings. A faint, handwritten annotation reading 'or similar' is visible below the first paragraph. The page has two punched holes at the top.

judge.reason: Description B claims a handwritten annotation 'or similar' is visible, which is not mentioned in Description A, creating a contradiction about the presence of a specific visual element.
